final_prompt.prompt:
Design a 3x3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) in 3:4 vertical format, optimized for clean slicing into 9 individual posts with cohesive visual identity.

Style/medium: clean editorial design, soft ins-style aesthetic, gentle flat illustration with light skeuomorphic elements, magazine-quality layout, female-oriented wellness lifestyle brand
Composition: 3-column × 3-row grid layout with clear borders between cells, each cell centered and self-contained, generous padding from grid lines, 3:4 aspect ratio overall
Subject: sleep wellness content series with 9 distinct tips, featuring soft pillows, crescent moon, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy candles, books, sleep masks, curtains, cozy bedding
Scene/backdrop: cream white and oatmeal beige background throughout all 9 cells, unified warm neutral environment, no distracting backgrounds
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light, cozy bedtime atmosphere, healing and calming mood, gentle shadows for depth without harsh contrast
Color palette: cream white base, light oatmeal and pale caramel as secondary, deep brown for text, minimal accent colors, harmonious warm-neutral family
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, soft fabric for bedding elements, smooth ceramic for cups, subtle grain for warmth
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: all text must be in Chinese characters only, no English text anywhere, each grid cell must work as standalone image after cropping, text must be large and readable, generous white space maintained, grid lines clearly visible for cutting
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, excessive decoration, cluttered layouts, small unreadable text, deformed Chinese characters, mismatched colors, busy backgrounds, stock-photo look, watermark
